title: ulex scaber var. willkommii
intro: Ulex scaber var. willkommii, also known as the spiny gorse, is a variety of the Ulex scaber plant species, characterized by its dense clusters of bright yellow flowers and sharp, thorny stems. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Ulex scaber var. willkommii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Ulex scaber var. willkommii is often combined with other herbs to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
